title: Chapter 146
content:

~~

I didn’t know where I was supposed to sleep, and since half of the western wing was being moved out, I had no idea who to ask either. So, I did the next best thing.

Contemplation.

I found the training area of the western wing and then found the nearest empty room.

There were some things I needed to sort out. I delayed them for some time, but now was a good time to check them and get this over with.

It had been over a month since we went to the dungeon, but I hadn’t checked the EXP gained from there, and also the recent notifications of the sex I just had.

There was one more thing worrying me about it, so I intended to check it all today before I moved any further from this. Hopefully, everything would be sorted out, with only a few questions remaining. Hopefully.

I started from the system status. My status.

[Name: Jack Houston]

[Race: Human]

[Level: 221]

[EXP: 4340\22100]

[HP: 2210]

[MP: 1000\102,500]

[Stats]

[Strength: 200

Agility: 200

Stamina: 200

Intelligence: 250

Charm: 80

Bonus stats: 235]

[Skills]

[Creation

Basilisk’s mist

Reinforcement

Cleanse

Fireball

Celestial…

…

…

…]

[Titles: None]

[Achievements: 5]

[Bloodline: ???]

[Partial bloodline activated]

[All physical stats +10, Intelligence + Charm +50]

[SC: 1,200,000]

Haa… How far had I come?

But that was still not anywhere near my full strength.

I needed more.

Anyway, moving on to the next agenda at hand.

[All techniques have been suppressed to stage 1]

[Requirements to upgrade all techniques to the next stage have not been met]

[Second incorporation requirement]

[All stats: 200]

[Level: 200]

[Author Note: I had also added the requirement for the aura core and mana circle to be both at the fourth stage, but the logic was that the Mc would have reached that by reaching level 200 anyway, so I didn’t mention them]

Now, the problem with this was that the requirement was for all of the stats to be raised to 200. That also included my charm. I kind of didn’t want to waste almost 120 stat points on charm. I was hesitant to do that.

It had taken me a month to decide whether or not to take that step. In the end, with the added threat of the capital, I had decided to take that step since the lowest-ranking knights here were equivalent to the strength in Hector from back in Jack’s hometown.

“Invest 120 points in charm.”

[Acknowledged]

[Charm: 200]

[All requirements for the second incorporation have been met]

[Would you like to begin assimilation?]

[Yes\No]

‘Haa…’

I took a deep breath and then exhaled before I prepared myself and replied…

‘Yes.’

[Acknowledged]

[Good luck]

“Kugghhh!!!”

~~

“Nothing is here.”

In the middle of a forest, in a clearing in the middle somewhere, stood a stunningly beautiful woman who could have charmed men with just a glance from her eyes. No, she wouldn’t even have to gaze at them. They would simply have to glance at her and…

Gone.

But such a woman, right now, had a scowl so ugly on her face that one might be scared out of their bodies.

However, she still didn’t seem ugly.

Because what surrounded her was even uglier, no matter how ugly she seemed, she could never match the ugliness of the surrounding creatures.

It was as if they were mashed together with goo, their bodies irregular and giant.

Their faces were as if they were screaming in pain, or to scare someone, and their bodies were terribly mutilated all over.

“Search the area!”

The woman loudly commanded, and the creatures moved around. They searched and searched, but found nothing.

As they found nothing, the anger of the woman increased. Soon, it had passed the boiling point.

It was then that…

“Gooh!!”

One of the creatures found something. A torn uniform.

The woman looked at the uniform and recognized the crest on it.

Her fists clenched as she turned her head in a specific direction. Far away from the forest, passing another clearing, there was a town, and the crest belonged to the soldiers of that town.

“Attack. Find me the ones responsible for taking what was mine.”

The woman spoke, her voice steady, but so scary that even the creatures felt afraid, and they took a step back.

“I SAID ATTACK!!!!”

Only when the woman yelled out louder did the creatures begin to run in the direction of the town.

Ready to massacre everyone.

~~

End of volume 3.

~~

A few points before I go forward. As I may have mentioned, I'll be taking a week long break to stockpile some chapters. I might return sooner, but don't count on it too much.

It could also be whenever I would receive a subscriber on Patreon, and they also announce here, but that is still under contemplation. You guys let me know,

Debate among yourself, discuss in comments or on the page, and I'll check them out when I return. I owe you guys an extra chapter thanks to the "Barfighter"s perfect review, but since I'm going on a break, as a compensation, I'll upload two chapters on Sunday. After that, I'll see you guys on Wednesday next week with new chapters.

Finally, the next ten to fifteen chapters would be heavily smut focused only. You can skip them if you want, but I won't recommend that because some key characters would be introduced, but if you still don't want to, then I'll try to make sure the character intro remains simple even for those who skip.

A little spoiler, I'll be introducing one of my favorite kind of kink next. Hope you guys share the same taste as me.

That's it. Enjoy.
